subject: docs: close residual audit items via live spot-checks on 4 repos
body:
Ran live spot-checks on the 4 repos that weren't re-verified after
the parallel agent audit (synctone, see-veo, model-pear, four-ems)
plus fetched synctone's KEY_LESSONS.md for the upstream decision.
One drift found, one decision made, one wording nit fixed.

model-pear — DRIFT FOUND, corrected:
The parallel-validation agent claimed "Communication section DONE
at line 365" — wrong. Live fetch shows line 365 is
"## Implementation Patterns (Source of Truth)", not Communication.
No "## Communication" top-level heading exists in model-pear's
CLAUDE.md at all. Corrections:
- Preamble claim "Communication section DONE" → reverted to "still
  missing" with explicit note re: agent error
- Restored the "CLAUDE.md — Add Communication section" subsection
  that I had mistakenly deleted
- Gap Matrix: model-pear CLAUDE.md Pass → Partial (Implementation
  Patterns + prohibition present; Communication still missing)
- Cross-Cutting Gap #2: moved model-pear from "Pass" list to
  "Partial" with specific rationale
- Added live-verified details on other known gaps: p-2 button still
  at line 68, `class="dark"` hardcoded at app.html line 2.

synctone, see-veo, four-ems — TODO accurate:
All three repos re-verified against live state. No drift.
- synctone: docs/HISTORY.md exists, docs/implementations/ has 8
  files, Suggested Implementations at CLAUDE.md line 1623, no
  Communication section, PWADebugBanner still inside _layout.tsx
  line 192, no flash prevention script in app/+html.tsx.
- see-veo: CLAUDE.md 717 lines, Suggested Implementations at 323,
  DebugBanner confirmed 2 tabs only (type Tab = 'diagnostics' |
  'log'), no iconCacheBust in vite.config.ts, index.css has
  @media print + .no-print but no print-color-adjust.
- four-ems: CLAUDE.md 957 lines, Suggested Implementations at 326,
  DebugPill has only 'log'|'env' tabs (no PWA Diagnostics),
  usePWAUpdate.ts has no visibilitychange/wasJustUpdated/
  controllerchange/30_000.

KEY_LESSONS — DECIDED: DELETE:
Fetched synctone's local KEY_LESSONS.md. All 7 lessons are already
covered by existing glow-props pattern docs:
- L1 (separate maskable icon), L2 (manifest id) → APP_ICONS.md +
  PWA_SYSTEM.md
- L3 (registerType prompt), L7 (single SW per scope) → PWA_SYSTEM.md
- L4 (timer cleanup, nested-timeout array) → new TIMER_LEAKS.md
- L5 (Node ignores proxy env), L6 (HTTP CONNECT) → HTTPS_PROXY.md
Zero synctone-specific content. Delete with the rest of the folder
as part of synctone's CLAUDE.md alignment chunk — no upstream work.

TIMER_LEAKS Key Lesson #2 wording fix:
Previous phrasing contradicted itself ("wait for outer, unmount —
inner never runs because it hadn't been scheduled"). Rewritten to
clarify the happy-path test passes precisely because unmount lands
BEFORE outer fires; the leak only surfaces in the outer-fire-to-
inner-fire window.

Tags: documentation, todo, audit, correction, cross-fleet
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
